message:
fix(auth): correct Claude Code credential file paths

Update Claude auth file detection to use the correct location:
- Primary: ~/.claude/.credentials.json (OAuth credentials)
- Secondary: ~/.claude.json (settings, not required)
- Settings: ~/.claude/settings.json (user settings)

The previous implementation incorrectly looked at ~/.claude.json as
the primary auth file, but this is actually a settings file. The
actual OAuth credentials (with claudeAiOauth object containing
accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt, rateLimitTier, etc.) are
stored in ~/.claude/.credentials.json.

Also adds parseClaudeCredentialsFile() to properly parse the
credentials file structure with Unix millisecond timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
